$bookId..write: auth != null && (root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() === 'admin' || (data.exists() && newData.child('id').val() === data.child('id').val() && newData.child('judul').val() === data.child('judul').val() && newData.child('jenis').val() === data.child('jenis').val() && ((newData.child('stock').val() === data.child('stock').val() - 1 || newData.child('stock').val() === data.child('stock').val() + 1) || (newData.child('stock').val() === data.child('stock').val() && newData.child('ratingAverage').isNumber() && newData.child('ratingCount').isNumber() && newData.child('ratingTotal').isNumber()))))
$bookId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'judul', 'jenis', 'stock']) && newData.child('id').isNumber() && newData.child('judul').isString() && newData.child('jenis').isString() && newData.child('stock').isNumber() && newData.child('stock').val() >= 0

ratingAverage..write: auth != null && data.parent().exists() && newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 0 && newData.val() <= 5

$loanId..write: auth != null && (root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() === 'admin' || (!data.exists() && newData.child('memberUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('memberUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('memberUid').val() === data.child('memberUid').val() && newData.child('bookId').val() === data.child('bookId').val() && newData.child('bookTitle').val() === data.child('bookTitle').val() && newData.child('borrowDate').val() === data.child('borrowDate').val() && newData.child('dueDate').val() === data.child('dueDate').val() && newData.child('rating').isNumber() && newData.child('rating').val() >= 1 && newData.child('rating').val() <= 5))

rating..write: auth != null && data.parent().child('memberUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.isNumber() && newData.val() >= 1 && newData.val() <= 5
